evidence: "It's nice to have a show we can watch together..."
"If you like a good, creepy ghost story, this one is hard to beat."
"Not Oscar-quality production, but not meant to be (and still good production values for TV)."
"The story was just too much a hodge podge of other movies' story lines."
"The pacing and building of tension kept me on the edge of my seat in many scenes."
"This one was too busy with plot lines and spectacle."
"Not Oscar-quality production, but not meant to be (and still good production values for TV)."
"While the production values on some of the scenes... can be almost laughable sometimes..."
"I found myself thinking about the movie and the general 'feel' it gave me afterwards..."
"The characters are fun to get to know and follow."
"The lessons are based on good, universal values."
"I began to not really care about his life."

summary: The user enjoys family-friendly and historical narratives with a preference for simple storytelling and mixed pacing. They appreciate emotional and atmospheric experiences but show low loyalty to specific creators or brands.
